test_cases.description: Summarize meeting notes in one sentence
test_cases.input: Summarize in one sentence: The team shipped offline mode, fixed prompt diffs, and added SQLite baselines.
test_cases.expected_output: The team shipped offline mode, prompt diffs, and SQLite baselines.

test_cases.description: Classify user intent from a short request
test_cases.input: Classify intent as billing or support: I need to update my invoice details.

test_cases.description: Answer a FAQ question from provided context
test_cases.input: How do I rotate API keys?
test_cases.expected_output: Rotate API keys from the security settings page.
test_cases.context: Account settings: API keys can be rotated from the security settings page.
